name: Get listed on Infogroup (Express Update)
description: Show up on Infogroup’s Express Update and get discovered by more customers
richtext:
Step 1: Find your Business

Go to their Express Update Tool and search for your business by entering your business name, phone number or address.

Step 2: Claim your Listing

If you see your business listed, click the blue “claim now” button. You will be redirected to a page with your business phone number shown in bold and a button “Yes, call me now”. Click the button for a verification call. As you press the “Yes, Call me now” button, the screen will refresh and display a 4-digit verification code. Simultaneously, they will call the number listed. The call will be automated and prompt you to enter the code.

Step 3: Edit your Listing

Once the verification is complete you will be asked to create an account. After creating an account you can update business information by clicking on the business name in the upper left of your account dashboard.

‍

‍
join_title: Spend More Time Running Your Business
join_description: And, less time obsessing about your local presence

seo.title: Get listed on Infogroup (ExpressUpdate) | Synup
seo.description: Learn how to claim and create your Infogroup business listing with this quick and simple tutorial.
